title: Provision of IT Consulting Services for Digital Transformation
description: Consulting services required for the assessment and planning phase of a major digital transformation initiative. Expertise in legacy system integration and cloud migration is essential.
issuing_department: Department of Communications and Digital Technologies
specifications: Consultant must have a minimum of 10 years experience in large-scale government IT projects.
Demonstrable expertise in a niche, proprietary legacy system (e.g., 'GovSys 3.0') is highly advantageous.
Team lead must possess specific certification 'XYZ-Cloud Architect Professional' (only held by a few individuals).
